levels.motivazione: Significant Call OI in all three expiries: 0DTE (91), WEEKLY (115), and MONTHLY (544). This creates a massive structural ceiling amplified by positive dealer gamma hedging.
Major Put OI concentration acting as a structural floor in 0DTE (149 OI) and WEEKLY (113 OI). Bears are defending this level, reinforced by the bearish 0DTE volatility skew.
Monster Monthly Call OI (3784). With positive GEX, this massive ITM open interest acts as a powerful magnetic anchor and structural support for the current spot price.
Highest 0DTE Call OI near the spot price (220 OI) with active volume (343). Represents immediate intraday resistance and a dealer hedging cap.
0DTE Max Pain level. Spot is currently trading at a premium to this level, indicating an intraday gravitational pull downwards as options expire.
Highest absolute Put OI in the 0DTE chain (424 OI). This is the ultimate downside barrier for the daily session, reinforced by the 'smirk' skew sentiment.
Extreme intraday Call volume (1674 Vol) against moderate OI (69). Indicates heavy intraday scalping and dealer dynamic hedging activity creating localized friction.
